reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service, but they lock the public restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Buen precio de combustibles,  tarjetas de débito y crédito . Los baños estan casi siempre en buen estado de higiene y mantenimiento.

(Translated by Google)
Good fuel prices, debit and credit cards accepted. The restrooms are almost always clean and well-maintained.
